name: Ask AI Assistant
description: Highlight text to ask AI questions using local Ollama or cloud APIs.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src http://127.0.0.1:11434 http://localhost:11434 https://api.groq.com https://api.openai.com https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com https://openrouter.ai
